ol.li: Memory Alignment: data_ptr should be 512-byte or 4KB aligned to avoid RMW overhead if using O_DIRECT.
Error Handling: Errors in sys_write may reflect memory faults (EFAULT); errors in sys_fsync reflect physical I/O failure (EIO).
Concurrency: VFS takes i_rwsem during sys_write to protect file pointer consistency.

g.title: Update File Pointer in File Description
Flush dirty pages to storage controller
